title: acantholimon echinus
intro: Acantholimon echinus, also known as the spiny-leaved acantholimon, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acantholimon echinus are attributed to its ability to improve wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Acantholimon echinus can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and gastrointestinal disorders.
